creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report. Could you please provide:

- FreeBSD version (uname -a output)
- pkg version -v output (as an attachmennt)
- Complete steps to reproduce the issue
- Description of expected behaviour
- Description of actual behaviour

This may also be a good candidate for reporting upstream, unless the problem can be isolated to FreeBSD / FreeBSD Port issue.
